content: div id  attachment_587118  style  width  780px  class  wp-caption aligncenter   img loading  lazy  decoding  async  aria-describedby  caption-attachment-587118  class  size-full wp-image-587118  src    alt  The award-winning MobED robot from Hyundai's Robotics Lab will be among the Korean systems on display at AW 2026.   width  770  height  497  srcset    770w,   300w,   150w,   768w,   368w  sizes  auto,  max-width  770px  100vw, 770px     p id  caption-attachment-587118  class  wp-caption-text  The MobED robot will be among the Korean systems on display at AW 2026. Source  Hyundai Motor Group  p   div   p As robotics and artificial intelligence continue to expand in manufacturing, logistics, and other sectors, Hyundai Motor Group s Robotics Lab will show its MobED mobile platform at Smart Factory   Automation World, or AW, in Seoul next week. Other leading industrial robotics suppliers will also participate in the event.  p   p  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Unveiled  a  in December 2025, MobED, short for  Mobile Eccentric Droid,  has four independently controlled wheels and an  eccentric  mechanism that enables agility and balance across a wide range of terrains, according to Hyundai. The  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  mobile robot  a  is maneuverable in industrial sites and logistics environments and received a  Best of Innovation Award  in the robotics category at  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  CES  a  2026.  p   p The Seoul-based  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  automaker  a  s  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Robotics Lab  a  has also built wearable systems and service robots for  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  delivery, parking  a , and safety inspections. In addition, Hyundai is the  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  parent company  a  of humanoid robot developer  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Boston Dynamics  a  and is  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  working with  a   a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Waymo  a  on robotaxis.  p   p  iframe loading  lazy  title  How do you develop an award-winning robot like Hyundai Motor Group Robotics LAB s MobED?  width  740  height  416  src    frameborder  0  allow  accelerometer  autoplay  clipboard-write  encrypted-media  gyroscope  picture-in-picture  web-share  referrerpolicy  strict-origin-when-cross-origin  allowfullscreen   iframe   p   h2 Global, Korean industrial suppliers to showcase tech trends  h2   p Held from March 4 to 6 at Coex in Seoul, AW 2026 is positioning itself beyond a traditional smart factory exhibition. Its organizers said this reflects  the industry s accelerating shift toward AI-native production systems, intelligent logistics, and next-generation robotics.   p   p More than 50 global robotics companies are expected to participate, including Japan s  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  industrial robotics  a  leader  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  FANUC  a , Denmark s  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  cobot  a  pioneer  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Universal Robots  a , and China s autonomous mobile robot   a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  AMR  a   provider  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Geekplus  a .  Their presence highlights the growing convergence of AI software, industrial robotics, and humanoid technologies across global manufacturing ecosystems,  asserted AW.  p   p Hyundai s Robotics Lab is just one of the leading  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Korean  a  organizations that will demonstrate their systems at the event. Logistics provider  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Hyundai Glovis  a , mobility unit  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Hyundai Movex  a , AMR provider  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  ROBOTIS  a , service system developer  a href    page 1  target  _blank  rel  noopener  Yujin Robot  a , and AMR maker  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Wonik Robotics  a  will also exhibit.  p   p  Together, these companies will present a comprehensive view of the technological trends shaping the future of the manufacturing industry,  said the organizers. They include include Coex, the Korea Industry Intelligentization Association, the Korea Smart Manufacturing Office, the Korea Machine Vision Industrial Association, Chomdan Inc., and the Korea International Trade Association.  p   hr     div style  text-align  center    a href     img loading  lazy  decoding  async  class  aligncenter size-full wp-image-568305  src    alt  SITE AD for the 2026 Robotics Summit save the date.  width  728  height  90      a   div   hr     h2 Smart Logistics Zone to spotlight MobED, autonomous driving  h2   p In addition to Hyundai s MobED, AW 2026 s Smart Logistics Zone will show innovations in  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  logistics  a . The zone will be organized around technologies such as robotics,  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  autonomous driving  a , and other  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  AI  a -driven systems. AW said the zone will offer insights into the future of logistics operations.  p   p The exhibition will also feature a series of robot-related conferences. On March 4, the China Humanoid Robot Conference will be  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  held  a  in Korea for the first time, featuring leading companies from  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  China  a . Executives from  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Unitree  a ,  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Fourier  a ,  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Leju  a , and  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  Huawei  a  will speak about the latest global trends and technological advancements in the robotics industry.  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  AGIBOT  a , Fourier, and Leju are also scheduled to present live  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  humanoid  a  robot demonstrations.  p   p  Through this exhibition, we expect visitors to be able to witness firsthand how the  Robot Wave  now sweeping across Korea s manufacturing industry is expanding beyond a technological trend into the industrial and capital markets.  stated the AW 2026 Secretariat.  AW will serve as a turning point, evolving beyond a traditional smart factory-focused exhibition into a one that highlights the humanoid industry based on AI and robotics.   p   p AW 2026 is currently accepting pre-registration through  a href    target  _blank  rel  noopener  its website  a . Pre-registered participants will receive complimentary admission as well as priority access to information on global smart factory industry trends.  p   div id  attachment_586258  style  width  1010px  class  wp-caption aligncenter   img loading  lazy  decoding  async  aria-describedby  caption-attachment-586258  class  size-full wp-image-586258  src    alt  The MobED platform from Hyundai Motor Group can operate inside and outside.  width  1000  height  649  srcset    1000w,   300w,   150w,   768w,   368w  sizes  auto,  max-width  1000px  100vw, 1000px     p id  caption-attachment-586258  class  wp-caption-text  The MobED platform is designed to operate indoors and outdoors. Source  Hyundai Motor Group  p   div   p The post  a href    to show MobED at AW as robotics, AI expand in manufacturing  a  appeared first on  a href    Robot Report  a .  p
